confidence_rationale: Foundational framework paper establishing cerebellar forward models for efference copy prediction. Grounded in cerebellar anatomy (pontocerebellar pathway receives efference copies; dentate→VL thalamus→motor/premotor closes the loop). Confirmed reafference reduction for self-generated stimulation in subsequent TMS and fMRI work. Directly supports MECH-098 requirement for E2_self prediction to feed E2_world via reafference cancellation.
